title: Genies Backend Engineer Intern Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# Genies Backend Engineer Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Genies Backend Engineer Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** San Mateo, CA
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Genies
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Genies is offering a Backend Engineer Intern internship position in San Mateo, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Genies's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Genies interview and increase your chances of success.
